data.title: Diagens Biotechnology Raises US$101 Million in Hong Kong IPO; Shares More Than Double on First Day of Trading
data.description: Hangzhou Diagens Biotechnology Co., Ltd. made its debut on HKEX as its initial public offering was oversubscribed by an astonishing 1,073 times. The medical imaging AI company, listed under HKEX: 02526, started trading on the Main Board of The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong on March 31, 2026. The closing price of the shares at the end of the trading day...

data.title: ATIS Expands its Footprint in Alberta Through Acquisition of Vinspec
data.description: A private equity firm from St. Louis, Thompson Street Capital Partners (TSCP), has revealed the acquisition of Vinspec by KJA, a subsidiary of ATIS, a TSCP portfolio company. ATIS is a reputed provider of elevator and escalator safety inspections, consulting, and managed services throughout North America. Vinspec is known for delivering thorough elevator and escalator consulting and inspection services to building owners, property managers, and architects. Thompson Street Capital Partners, based in St. Louis, continues to expand its portfolio with this recent acquisition in the field of elevator and escalator safety services.

data.title: Vinitaly 2026 Announces Masterclass Program Set to Challenge Assumptions and Bring Wine Professionals Together
data.description: In Verona, Italy, on March 31, 2026, Vinitaly, the top global wine and spirits exhibition taking place yearly, revealed details of its upcoming event. The program includes specialized masterclasses and blind tastings conducted by prominent personalities from the worldwide wine industry.

data.title: Bitcoin price falls below $66K before US War Dept. briefing; trapped buyers at $68K, oil still above $100. US War Sec. Hegseth to speak.
data.description: Bitcoin has left late buyers stuck at a price of $68,000, while oil remains above $100. The US War Secretary Pete Hegseth is scheduled to hold a press briefing soon.

data.title: Keyrock, a crypto market maker, reaches $1.1 billion valuation led by SC Ventures for product expansion and global growth.
data.description: Keyrock, a company in the financial sector, is gearing up for growth with the help of Standard Chartered's venture arm. They recently secured a substantial amount of funding in a round led by this venture arm. The funds will enable Keyrock to expand their product offerings, seek out potential acquisitions, and increase their presence on a global scale. This new investment marks a significant milestone for Keyrock as they continue to advance and solidify their position in the market.

data.title: SCYNEXIS Completes Transformative Acquisition of PXL-770, an innovative, highly selective, direct AMPK activator for the Treatment of Autosomal Dominant Polycystic Kidney Disease (ADPKD)
data.description: SCYNEXIS has scheduled a conference call for March 31, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time to offer a corporate update to stakeholders and investors.

data.title: Russia aims to restrict crypto trading to licensed intermediaries and limit retail purchases to $3,700 per year with approved draft bill package.
data.description: Russia has passed a proposed set of cryptocurrency laws that aim to regulate trading through authorized intermediaries and limit individual retail transactions to $3,700 per year.

data.title: Immunic Strengthens Its Board of Directors with the Appointment of Seasoned Biopharmaceutical Executive Jon Congleton
data.description: An individual possessing almost four decades of experience in the biopharmaceutical field, specializing in Central Nervous System (CNS) treatments and commercial leadership roles, particularly within Multiple Sclerosis (MS) management. They were a part of the original team involved in the introduction of Copaxone® in the US. The announcement was made in New York on March 31, 2026, by Immunic, Inc. listed on Nasdaq as IMUX.

data.title: Keenova Announces Unaudited Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results
data.description: The company demonstrated a strong performance in the fourth quarter, mainly attributed to the success of Acthar® Gel and XIAFLEX®. Both financial and operational aspects surpassed expectations as the company finalized its shift into a branded therapeutics firm. Additionally, a Hammer Toe trial achieved the primary safety goal and secondary, exploratory objectives.

data.title: Mudrick Capital Management Expands European Platform with Appointment of Andrew Meares as Managing Director
data.description: A seasoned investor specializing in credit and special situations will be heading the investment endeavors for the UK and Europe from the London office. This was declared on March 31, 2026, by Mudrick Capital Management, L.P., a New York located event-driven investment company. Andrew, the appointed individual, will be driving the investment strategies in these regions.

data.title: CGI launches new AI capabilities in CGI Credit Studio to transform collections operations
data.description: CGI has introduced advanced AI features that lessen post-call tasks, boosting productivity, reliability, and adherence within debt collection activities. The company, traded as GIB.A on TSX and GIB on NYSE, shared this development in San Diego on March 31, 2026.
Reports in Israel: The government again approved the appointment of the new Second Authority Council
Fuel: Lithuania halves train ticket prices

data.title: Baltic Horizon Fund consolidated audited results for 2025
data.description: The Management Board of Baltic Horizon Capital AS has given the green light to the audited financial outcomes of the Baltic Horizon Fund for the full year of 2025. These results stood consistent with the initial disclosure made on 17 February 2026, showing no alterations.
KDIGO releases draft of 2026 guideline for Acute Kidney Injury and Acute Kidney Disease management.

data.title: Block Shares Rise 4% Pre-Market As Square Introduces Automatic Bitcoin Payments For Merchants With No Processing Fees
data.description: Shares of Block Inc. (NYSE: XYZ) saw an increase in pre-market trading on Tuesday following the announcement that its Square point-of-sale system has introduced automatic Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) payments for eligible U.S. merchants. According to a post by Square, this new feature allows sellers to seamlessly accept Bitcoin payments that instantly convert to cash at checkout, requiring no extra setup. Notably, there will be no processing fees for these transactions until 2026. It is important to mention that this feature is accessible to all U.S.-based merchants except those located in New York. The automatic Bitcoin payment option is currently being rolled out to qualifying U.S. Square sellers. More information is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Epson Announces Authorized Distribution Alliance with Clayton Controls to Deliver Advanced Automation Solutions to the Southwest Region
data.description: A press release dated March 31, 2026 from LOS ALAMITOS, California revealed that Epson Robots, a leading SCARA robot manufacturer globally, has formed a strategic partnership with Clayton Controls, Inc. The collaboration aims to provide cutting-edge automation solutions in the Southwest region. Epson Robots is recognized as the top SCARA robot producer globally. Clayton Controls, a company with almost six decades of experience, will be assisting in this endeavor.
